case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CARLOS ALBERTO BENCOMO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED DEC-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BENCOMO, CARLOS ALBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS ALBERTO BENCOMO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BENCOMO, CARLOS ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENCOMO, CARLOS ALBERTO $2,253.86 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,353.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
